message:
ProLine X Launch Kickoff

Welcome to the ProLine X Launch channel! Use this for all launch-related updates, questions, and coordination.

Key dates:

  • GA target: June 9, 2026
  • Sales enablement materials: May 15
  • Press release: May 20
  • Launch event: June 12

Let's make this our biggest launch yet!

Battle cards are in progress. First draft covers Fabrikam X200 and Northwind NX-Pro. Should have them ready by Wednesday.

Quick question for everyone: are we positioning ProLine X as a replacement for ProLine S or an upgrade path? This matters for messaging.

Upgrade path for existing customers, new platform for greenfield. Different messaging tracks for each.

Also - just confirmed Adatum meeting for Thursday this week. Pipeline is looking strong.

Update: Engineering flagged a potential issue with IoT sensor calibration in high-humidity environments. They're investigating. Will update by Thursday.

For now, do not commit to June 9 GA date externally until we have clarity.
Noted. I've added this to the risk tracker. Molly - can you get engineering to join Thursday standup with a status update?
Great news! Engineering confirmed the IoT sensor fix ships May 22. GA date June 9 is confirmed. The issue only affected a specific sensor model. All clear to proceed with external commitments.
Big win! Adventure Works is ready to sign. $850K deal, want to be a launch reference customer. Starting July 1. This could be our first signed ProLine X customer!
That's fantastic! Can we get a quote from Adventure Works for the press release? I need it by May 8 for legal review.

Adatum Corp - Deal Room

Using this channel to coordinate everything related to the Adatum $2.4M opportunity. Key contacts:

  • Lisa Chen - VP Procurement (decision maker)
  • Marcus Webb - Director of Operations (technical influencer)

Meeting Thursday this week. Let's close this one.

Pulled January meeting notes. Key takeaway: they committed to a pilot if we show 15% throughput improvement. Our ProLine S data shows 18.3%. Should be a slam dunk on that front.

Budget deadline: June 30 or it rolls to next FY.

Competitive positioning slides are done. Key messages: we deploy in 8 weeks vs Fabrikam's 6 months, AI is included (not a $150K add-on), Azure IoT native.

Uploaded to SharePoint under Adatum Corp folder.

Post-meeting update: Meeting went well. Lisa was impressed with deployment speed. Marcus liked the AI demo. Two follow-ups needed:

  1. Reference customer in food manufacturing
  2. SAP integration deep-dive

I'll have the formal proposal ready by May 5. Feeling 70% confident on close.
For the food manufacturing reference - what about Munson's Pickles? They did a successful ProLine S pilot last year. Not on X yet but the context is relevant.
Reminder: Q2 board deck sections are due Friday at 3 PM. Please submit to me directly. Template is in SharePoint.
Heads up - the ProLine X preview video is now available for customer-facing use. Link in the product channel. Please use the approved version only - no screen recordings of the beta build.
